revision.comment: Text replacement - "[[Category:automatic wikipedia redirects]]" to "<nowiki>[[Category:Automatic wikipedia redirects]]</nowiki>"
Bot: add [[Category:templates missing wikidata]] (no interwikis found)
Bot: add [[Category:templates missing wikidata]] (no interwikis found)
Bot: add [[Category:templates missing wikidata]] (no interwikis found)
Bot: add {{wikidata link|Q...}} or [[Category:Templates without wikidata]]

imported only latest revision from https://archive.org/details/miraheze-wiki-shintowiki-20251218 to avoid excessive disk usage, comment on the revision was Text replacement - "[[commons:" to "[[co:commons:"
Bot: Adding dummy category to make categories work after wiki restoration
Bot: wrap 3 stray tag(s) in noinclude [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/23176857634|manual triggered pipeline]]

[[Project:History cleanup|Offloading history due to miraheze stability concerns]] many contributors, see [https://emmaleonhart.github.io/shintowiki-scripts/wikihistory.html?page=Commons-inline%2Fdoc here] for full history [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24756154998|commit triggered pipeline]]
revision.text:
{{Documentation subpage}} {{High-use}} {{Lua|Module:Commons link}} This template relies on [[Template:Sister-inline]]. ==Purpose== This template can be used to generate a link to a page containing media related to a [[co:commons:Commons:Categories|Commons category]]. It is intended for use in the "[[WP:LAYOUTEL|External links]]" section of an article. ==Usage== * {{Commons-inline|Commons-gallery-page-name}} Commons gallery page name is optional; if missing, the template will look up the associated gallery in Wikidata. If that's missing, it will find the associated category. If that's missing, it will finally fall back to a Commons search. ; Full syntax * {{Commons-inline |list= wikitext for a list |links= wikitext to override default link |Commons-gallery-page-name= |extratext= extra text |search= string to search in Commons |notrack= turn off tracking categories |italic= italicize link text }} ==Examples== ; Normal * {{Commons-inline|Work}} * {{Commons-inline|Work}} ; Text override Work is the link target and Puffle is the link label. * {{Commons-inline|Work|Puffle}} * {{Commons-inline|Work|Puffle}}
; Full link override * {{Commons-inline|links=[[co:commons:Foo|]] and [[co:commons:Bar|]]}} * {{Commons-inline|links=[[co:commons:Foo|Foo]] and [[co:commons:Bar|Bar]]}} ; List format * {{Commons-inline|list= * [[co:commons:Foo|Foo]] * [[co:commons:Bar|Bar]] * [[co:commons:Row|Row]] * [[co:commons:Dee|Dee]] }} {{Commons-inline|list= * [[co:commons:Foo|Foo]] * [[co:commons:Bar|Bar]] * [[co:commons:Row|Row]] * [[co:commons:Dee|Dee]] }} ; Another list format, including Commons templates: * {{Commons-inline|list= :[[c:Commons:Timed Text|Commons:Timed Text]] :{{[[Commons:Template:Captions requested|Captions requested]]}} }} * {{Commons-inline|list= :[[c:Commons:Timed Text|Commons:Timed Text]] :{{[[Commons:Template:Captions requested|Captions requested]]}} }} ; Extra text * {{Commons-inline|Work|extratext= Extra text}} * {{Commons-inline|Work|extratext= Extra text}} ; Force Commons search * {{Commons-inline|search=Work}} * {{Commons-inline|search=Work}} ; Turn off tracking categories (for use inside other templates) * {{Commons-inline|Work|notrack=1}} * {{Commons-inline|Work|notrack=1}} == Tracking categories == === Normal categories === * {{clc|Commons link from Wikidata}} * {{clc|Commons link is on Wikidata}} === Maintenance categories === * {{clc|Commons link is defined as the pagename}} * {{clc|Commons link is locally defined}} * {{clc|Commons link is the pagename}} * {{clc|Inconsistent wikidata for Commons gallery}} ==See also== {{Commons templates see also}} ==TemplateData== {{TemplateData header}} { "params": { "1": { "label": "Commons gallery", "description": "Title of Commons gallery. If empty, looks up relevant gallery or category in Wikidata", "type": "string" }, "2": { "label": "Display text", "description": "Link text to display. If empty, uses gallery or category title", "type": "string" }, "short": { "description": "Do not display any text, just logo and link", "type": "boolean", "default": "false" }, "list": { "description": "bulletted list to use instead of generated text", "type": "content" }, "links": { "description": "wikitext to use instead of default links", "type": "content" }, "search": { "description": "If non-empty, string to search for in Commons", "type": "string" }, "italic": { "description": "whether to italicize link text", "type": "boolean", "default": "false" }, "notrack": { "description": "if true, turn off tracking categories", "type": "boolean", "default": "false" }, "extratext": { "description": "Extra text to add after normal template result", "type": "content" } }, "description": "Add an inline link to Commons gallery or category related to article", "paramOrder": [ "1", "2", "italic", "notrack", "links", "list", "extratext", "short", "search" ], "format": "inline" } {{Sandbox other|| }} [[Category:templates missing wikidata]] [[Category:templates missing wikidata]] [[Category:templates missing wikidata]] [[Category:Inline interwiki link templates]] [[Category:Wikimedia Commons templates]] [[Category:Templates]] [[Category:Templates fixed with noinclude]]
